SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa

Interface Work

All Known Implementing Classes:
UnitOfWork
public interface Work
Indicates a work that an EntityManager is performing.

Once an instance of an EntityManager is obtained, it can be used to perform any database operation. Every activity that it performs, is identified by Work. An EntityManager can perform multiple works for better reusability. Each such task is identified by this object. Whenever a new task is started, a Connection is obtained from the underlying datasource, and kept alive until the task is destroyed.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    active()
    Indicate whether the current task is active.
    void
    complete()
    Indicates the completion of a task.
    Connection
    connection()
    Return the connection object used to perform this work.
    jakarta.persistence.EntityManager
    entityManager()
    Return the entity manager this UnitOfWork is associated with.
    void
    start()
    Indicate the start of a work.

  • Method Details

    • start

      void start()
      Indicate the start of a work.

    • active

      boolean active()
      Indicate whether the current task is active.
      Returns:
      boolean

    • connection

      Connection connection()
      Return the connection object used to perform this work. If the task is not yet active, then no connection object will be present, and this API will return null.
      Returns:
      Connection

    • complete

      void complete()
      Indicates the completion of a task. Once the task is complete, all its associated resources will be freed up, and connection will be returned to pool.

    • entityManager

      jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager()
      Return the entity manager this UnitOfWork is associated with.
      Returns:
      EntityManager
